implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: AC-001 — module path src/forge/pipeline/forward_context_builder.py with ForwardContextBuilder class
AC-002 — build_for signature returning list[ContextEntry] for text/path/path-list recipes
AC-003 — approved-only reads enforced by StageLogReader Protocol contract
AC-004 — WorktreeAllowlist filtering with structured WARNING log
AC-005 — per-feature consumer scoping with missing-feature_id safe default
AC-006 — parametrised coverage of all 7 PROPAGATION_CONTRACT rows
AC-008 — outside-allowlist path filtered with structured warning
AC-009 — black-formatted, no lint errors, all 1220 prior tests still pass

completion_promises.evidence: Created src/forge/pipeline/forward_context_builder.py exporting ForwardContextBuilder class. Verified by TestForwardContextBuilderExists class (3 tests) covering module path, file location, and instantiability with the two reader Protocols.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Method build_for(stage: StageClass, build_id: str, feature_id: str | None) -> list[ContextEntry] returns the context entries (path or text) to thread into the next stage's dispatch
completion_promises.evidence: ForwardContextBuilder.build_for has the documented signature and returns list[ContextEntry]. ContextEntry is a frozen dataclass with flag, value, and kind fields ('text' or 'path'). Covered by TestBuildForReturnsContextEntries (3 tests across text, path, and path-list recipes).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Reads stage_log rows scoped by build_id, optionally feature_id, with gate_decision='approved' only — never reads in-progress or flagged-for-review entries
completion_promises.evidence: StageLogReader Protocol's get_approved_stage_entry method is approved-only by contract: there is no flag for the builder to widen the filter. Covered by TestApprovedOnly (3 tests) including no-prior-entry, in-progress (returns None by Protocol contract), and a check that the builder does not bypass the filter.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Refuses to return any entry whose underlying artefact path falls outside the build's worktree allowlist (defence-in-depth alongside FEAT-FORGE-005)
completion_promises.evidence: _build_path_entries calls WorktreeAllowlist.is_allowed for every path; rejects are filtered out individually with a structured WARNING log line including build_id, path, and recipe description. Covered by TestAllowlistEnforcement (3 tests) including allowed-vs-denied mix, text-bypasses-allowlist, and single-path-rejected.

completion_promises.criterion_text: For per-feature stages, scopes the lookup to that feature's prior stage entry only
completion_promises.evidence: build_for forwards feature_id into the StageLogReader call when the producer is in PER_FEATURE_STAGES; per-feature consumer + missing feature_id yields an empty list (safe-default). Covered by TestPerFeatureScoping (3 tests) including FEAT-1/FEAT-2 isolation, per-feature-consumer-with-non-per-feature-producer, and missing-feature_id misuse.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests cover all seven PROPAGATION_CONTRACT rows
completion_promises.evidence: TestAllSevenPropagationContractRows.test_each_contract_row_produces_at_least_one_entry is parametrised across list(PROPAGATION_CONTRACT.keys()) — 7 rows: ARCHITECT, SYSTEM_ARCH, SYSTEM_DESIGN, FEATURE_SPEC, FEATURE_PLAN, AUTOBUILD, PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW. Each shapes a synthetic ApprovedStageEntry matching the recipe's artefact_kind and asserts the resulting entries match the recipe's flag.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit test: in-progress prior stage → empty context (must wait until approved)
completion_promises.evidence: TestApprovedOnly.test_in_progress_prior_stage_returns_empty_context exercises the case where no approved row exists; the StageLogReader returns None and build_for returns []. The Protocol's approved-only contract is what makes 'in-progress' invisible to the builder.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit test: artefact path outside allowlist is filtered out with a structured warning
completion_promises.evidence: TestAllowlistEnforcement.test_path_outside_allowlist_is_filtered_out asserts the rejected path is dropped, the allowed path survives, and a WARNING-level log record is emitted by logger 'forge.pipeline.forward_context_builder' containing both the offending path and the build_id.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Both files were formatted with `python3 -m black --target-version py312`. Black reports 'All done!' with zero reformat actions on a re-check. No syntax errors; module imports cleanly via existing test suite (1220 prior tests still pass).
